OtherIncreasesDetail.Desc: Adjust land basis to cost from estate distribution
Prior period partnership interests basis adjustment

ReasonableCauseExplanation.ExplanationTxt: John M. Belk Endowment (the foundation) respectfully requests abatement of penalties related to late payment of tax for this amended 2016 Form 990-PF. The foundation entered into partnership investments in 2016, and the tax preparer did not know to expect Schedules K-1. The foundation exercised ordinary business care and prudence in relying on its investment and tax advisors to include all taxable income in the return as originally filed. The omission of partnership income was not due to willful neglect. Once the omission of partnership income was recognized, the foundation took immediate steps to amend this return to properly report it.
